IoT Integration

miraX integrates IoT (Internet of Things) data streams to provide real-time monitoring of water systems.

Data Sources

  • Water level sensors
  • Flow meters
  • Rain gauges
  • Weather stations
  • Remote sensing devices

Capabilities

  • Real-time data ingestion
  • Sensor visualisation on maps
  • Alerts and thresholds
  • Historical data analysis
  • Integration with forecasting models

Example Applications

  • Flood monitoring
  • Reservoir management
  • Early warning systems
  • Infrastructure monitoring

Suggested Images

  • Sensor icons on map
  • Dashboard with real-time graphs
  • IoT architecture diagram
  • Time-series chart (water level)

iot sensors realtime
